name: Multiple firms in AI referral chain—who to sue?
description: All in chain; use referral tracking.[4][8]

mainEntity.name: Multiple firms in AI referral chain—who to sue?

acceptedAnswer.text: All in chain; use referral tracking.[4][8]
acceptedAnswer.description: Primary referrer and accepting firm jointly; track via networks.[4] Factors: fee split agreements, each's negligence. NY joint liability rules.[8] Subpoena chain docs. Lawyer needed for apportionment.
